task_completion.description: Create a spreadsheet with the required aliases and values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet tab or window is visible in FreeCAD containing the texts 'outer_diameter', 'inner_diameter', 'height', 'flange_diameter', and 'flange_height' along with their respective values (8, 3.2, 10, 12, 1.5).
In the FreeCAD Combo View (Tree View), a 'Body' icon (blue stairs/part icon) is visible, containing features like Sketch, Pad, or Pocket, indicating the Part Design workbench was used.

task_completion.description: Model a standoff with a flange and a post.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D view displays a solid model that looks like a standoff: it has a wider cylindrical base (the flange) and a narrower cylindrical top section (the post).

task_completion.description: Include a through-hole in the standoff model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D model has a visible hole going completely through its center along the vertical axis.

task_completion.description: Link dimensions to the spreadsheet via expressions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the property editor or task panel (e.g., when editing a Pad or Sketch), there are blue circular 'f(x)' icons next to dimension input fields, OR the Formula/Expression editor dialog is visible showing a reference to the Spreadsheet.

task_completion.description: Save the completed model to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar or the root node in the Tree View displays 'parametric_standoff' or 'parametric_standoff.FCStd'.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD GUI to create the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the FreeCAD graphical user interface to create the spreadsheet and 3D model, rather than just running a script in the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI using a complete Python script.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent did not paste a complete, pre-written Python script into the FreeCAD Python console to generate the model automatically.

integrity.description: The agent built the model from scratch rather than importing a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Tree View shows a history of created features (e.g., Sketches, Pads, Spreadsheet) rather than a single imported solid (like a STEP or STL file).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a parametric PCB mounting standoff in FreeCAD. Required spreadsheet aliases and values: outer_diameter (8.0 mm), inner_diameter (3.2 mm), height (10.0 mm), flange_diameter (12.0 mm), and flange_height (1.5 mm). The model must be a 3D Part Design Body consisting of a post on a flange with a through-hole. Dimensions must be parametrically linked to the spreadsheet using expressions (minimum 3 expressions). The final output must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/parametric_standoff.FCStd.
